memberdef.argsstring: (FHttpRequestPtr &InRequest, FHttpRequestCompleteDelegate const &InCompleteDelegate, double InRequestTime, double InNextDelay, FHttpRetrySchedulerWPtr const &InHttpRetrySchedulerWPtr, TMap< EHttpResponseCodes::Type, FHttpRetryScheduler::FHttpResponseCodeHandler > HandlerDelegates={})
memberdef.name: FHttpRetryTask

briefdescription.para: Stop the Task in the middle of the process.
Pause the Task in the middle of the process.
